name: Titan Minerals Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 39% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.7500, stop A$0.6534, target A$0.8350 (0.88:1) — then trail it.
